answer:
Asana provides an official Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that enables AI assistants to access and interact with the Asana Work Graph. The server is available at the endpoint `https://mcp.asana.com/v2/mcp`.

To use it, configure your MCP client to connect to that URL using Streamable HTTP transport and OAuth authentication. You must pre-register an OAuth app in the Asana developer console to obtain a client ID and secret. The official server is user-authenticated, meaning actions performed via MCP are subject to the permissions of the user who authorized the connection.
